diagrams.title: Template Instantiation Process
diagrams.description: Shows how a template becomes actual code
diagrams.purpose: Understand how templates generate type-specific code at compile time

diagrams.title: Function Template Overload Resolution
diagrams.description: Shows how the compiler selects between regular function and template
diagrams.purpose: Learn how overload resolution works with templates and regular functions

diagrams.title: Class Template Specialization Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between primary template and its specializations
elements: Primary Template: template<typename T> class Container {}
Partial Specialization: template<typename T*> class Container<T*> {}
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how specializations relate to the primary template
